data.text: M03P07, DUSTY, SMALL, CRATERS, PRO 0.115.560; PRV 0.008.609.940 ///
FAIRLY REFLECTIVE WITH A ROUGH SURFACE, A FEW CRATERS OF MODERATE SIZE
/// AT 333.042, -16.23, A MESA-TYPE HAVING AN EXTREME AMOUNT OF
FRACTURING TO ITS SOUTHEAST FACE WITH A SMALL POINT ON TOP. IT IS
INVOLVED WITH THE SIDE OF A VERY SMALL MOUND. /// SKINNYMON
